name: Nevana Table Lamp W/ USB Port - 20 Inch Height - TBL4463 - Multi - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Nevava 20 inch iron table lamp, a perfect companion for your modern living space. Crafted from durable iron and fabric, this lamp showcases a stylish multi color finish that complements any decor. Its sleek design features a convenient USB port, ensuring your devices stay charged while you work or relax. The brass and white accents create a warm and inviting ambiance, making it an ideal choice for bedrooms, living rooms, or offices. Its practical size and thoughtful features blend functionality with elegance, adding a touch of sophistication to your favorite spaces. Illuminate your surroundings with Nevava and embrace a seamless blend of style and convenience.
